payload.answer: I cannot comply with requests to ignore memory policies or store information without adherence to safety and confidence protocols.

entity_resolution.reason: The request attempts to override core memory safety policies, which is prohibited. No memory will be stored under this instruction.

details: Request to ignore memory policy detected and rejected.

repair_options: Rephrase the request to comply with memory policies.
Specify what information should be remembered under normal confidence and policy guidelines.
